allow: Bash(find "C:\\Users\\Crans\\CastleDefenderClient\\Assets\\HEROIC FANTASY CREATURES FULL PACK VOL 1\\Must Have Fantasy Villains Pack\\Goblin" -name "*.fbx" -o -name "*.FBX" 2>/dev/null | head -10)
Bash(find "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Library/PackageCache" -name "*.asmdef" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "universal\\|urp" | grep -v editor | grep -v test)

Bash(HFC="C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/HEROIC FANTASY CREATURES FULL PACK VOL 1"
DEST="C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Art/icons/units"

cp "$HFC/Fantasy Lizards Pack/Wyvern/Textures/T_Wyvern_Albedo.png"                       "$DEST/wyvern_send_icon.png"

Bash(cp "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Art/icons/units/goblin_send_icon.png" "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Resources/Icons/units/goblin_send_icon.png" && cp "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Art/icons/units/orc_send_icon.png" "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Resources/Icons/units/orc_send_icon.png" && cp "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Art/icons/units/troll_send_icon.png" "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Resources/Icons/units/troll_send_icon.png" && cp "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Art/icons/units/vampire_send_icon.png" "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Resources/Icons/units/vampire_send_icon.png" && cp "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Art/icons/units/wyvern_send_icon.png" "C:/Users/Crans/CastleDefenderClient/Assets/Resources/Icons/units/wyvern_send_icon.png" && echo "done")
